calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #2, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-22-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Janet Espey for Craig Forte.

Ms. Espey stated that she filed a supplemental to address the issues, that this after acquired property was property they learned about after the order of final distribution was made, spoke of the nature of the case (class action), stated that $360,000.00 was the first value of the property that was learned and that the case took another year to settle. Ms. Espey also stated that the property hadn't even been inventoried when the final order was signed, that there were some fees involved, that they are requiring only one percent of this property, that if they had known about it they would've done a petition for preliminary distribution, and that the injury sustained was not related to the decedent's death. The Petition for Final Distribution of After Acquired Property, etc. is taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Establishment Of Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Mar-21-2016 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Janet Espey, for Craig Forte

The Court stated that he is ready to proceed with a partial distribution, and asked about the anticipated date for establishment of a special needs trust for Jessica. Ms. Espey stated that a conservatorship petition was scheduled to be heard in Santa Clara on Tuesday, December 8, 2015, and that the special needs trust would follow that. The Couet inquired regarding the appropriate amount for a bond. Ms. Espey stated that the bond should be in the sum of the two subtrusts, which she stated were in the amounts of $38, 578 and $77,157.
The Court granted the partial distribution (subject to review of the order), and the petition for final distribution was taken under submission. The Court set a status hearing re the establishment of the special needs trust for March 21, 2016.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not reported).
